pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a release compatible with Java 11 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not fully support or correctly handle the 'release' flag or Java 11 bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch compiler configuration from source/target to release flag for Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' in Java 9+; using them with Java 11 toolchains can lead to mismatched bootstrap classpaths or warnings, and 'release' is the standard way to ensure API compatibility with the target version.
